title: Floating Action Button (FAB)
description: The Floating Action Button (FAB) highlights the primary action of a screen. It appears as a circular, elevated button that floats above content, providing quick and consistent access to key actions. FABs support icon-only and extended (labeled) variants and are typically positioned in a fixed corner. Only one FAB should be used per view to maintain a clear user experience.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-fab with child ax-fab-item elements to create an expandable floating action button.

sections.title: Tooltip
sections.description: Demonstrates adding tooltips to the FAB and its items using the axTooltip directive from @acorex/components/tooltip. Tooltips provide contextual labels on hover without occupying extra space.

sections.title: Label
sections.description: Shows how to use the label input to display text alongside the icon in both ax-fab and ax-fab-item, creating an extended FAB variant.

props.name: label
props.description: Defines the text label displayed alongside the icon, creating an extended FAB variant.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Fires each time the user clicks the FAB button.

props.name: label
props.description: Defines the text label displayed alongside the icon for this FAB menu item.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Fires each time the user clicks this FAB item.
